subject: feat(ui): add fixed-height sizing mode to MiniCellGrid
body:
Portrait formats (9:16 Stories/TikTok) caused the ContextBar cell grid
to grow to 114px+ tall, consuming excessive vertical space on mobile.
Added a fixedHeight prop (s=32px, m=44px, l=56px) that caps grid height
and derives width from aspectRatio, keeping the bar compact regardless
of platform. ContextBar now uses fixedHeight="s" instead of the old
size="contextbar" mode.

Also cleaned up dead MiniCellGrid import in StyleTab and made the
default cell appearance mode use the fontSize variable consistently.

Tags: ui, layout, mobile, contextbar
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
